mapper.delete: DELETE FROM product_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT product_id FROM product_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.price, p.image, p.sales, COUNT(DISTINCT pf2.user_id) as score FROM product_favorite pf1 JOIN product_favorite pf2 ON pf1.product_id = pf2.product_id AND pf1.user_id != pf2.user_id JOIN product p ON pf2.product_id = p.id WHERE pf1.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.id NOT IN (SELECT product_id FROM product_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}) GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.price, p.image, p.sales ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT pf2.user_id, COUNT(*) as common_count FROM product_favorite pf1 JOIN product_favorite pf2 ON pf1.product_id = pf2.product_id AND pf1.user_id != pf2.user_id WHERE pf1.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY pf2.user_id ORDER BY common_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT pf2.product_id as id, COUNT(DISTINCT pf1.user_id) as similarity FROM product_favorite pf1 JOIN product_favorite pf2 ON pf1.user_id = pf2.user_id AND pf1.product_id != pf2.product_id WHERE pf1.product_id = #{productId} GROUP BY pf2.product_id ORDER BY similarity DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.original_price, p.category_id, p.category_name, p.image, p.images, p.sales, p.status, p.is_hot, p.is_new, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM product_favorite pf INNER JOIN product p ON pf.product_id = p.id WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY pf.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_favorite pf INNER JOIN product p ON pf.product_id = p.id WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1
